item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: Download Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Download Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Download Online Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Instant message program provides option to save sent message as template for used in future require and store contact number list from mobile to PC. Bulk text messaging software is used to connecting GSM mobile phone to your computer system. Website www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com introduces Download Online Text Messaging application that helps to text message from computer to mobile phone regarding Reminders, Deadline, Events, Meetings, Interview and other messages from computer to cell phone without require of any technical knowledge. Any technical and non technical user easily can easily operate GSM technology based effective SMS tool and send text message from pc to GSM mobile phone number. Highly capable messaging utility provides option to send text message without internet connectivity.

[read more]

[read more]

Instant message program provides option to save sent message as template for used in future require and store contact number list from mobile to PC. Any technical and non technical user easily can easily operate GSM technology based effective SMS tool and send text message from pc to GSM mobile phone number. item.title: Employee Shift Scheduler Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Employee Shift Scheduler Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: orderorganizersoft1
item.itunes:summary:
Employee Shift Scheduler Software
(Office Apps)
Download comprehensive Employee Shift Scheduler Software for your company that facilitates to manage staff tour and training information for your industry in few easy steps. Cost effective work planning utility monitors employee leave details including sick leaves, casual leaves etc very effectively.
[read more]

item.title: Online Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Online Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Online Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Affordable SMS transferring tool for Multi Phones facilitates layman user to transfer unlimited text messages from laptop with GSM technology based phone without requiring internet connection. Online Text Messaging Software is useful for small to large business organization for broadcasting new scheme alerts, event notifications and product launching details to your global business partners, employees and users mobile in simplified manner.

[read more]
